description_long: This is a large, single-family house with a sprawling rectangular footprint and a complex, multi-hipped roof structure. The exterior features a combination of light-colored walls and dark gray roofing, with several gabled projections and dormers adding architectural interest. A prominent covered entryway with columns leads to the main door, and there is an attached garage connected by a driveway. The backyard includes a patio area, a small round structure that could be a hot tub, and a rectangular swimming pool. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger panes and bay-style projections, and the property is bordered by paved walkways and landscaped areas.
description: A large, light-colored house with a multi-hipped dark roof, covered entryway, attached garage, and backyard amenities including a pool and patio. The design features symmetrical windows and several gabled roof sections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with columns, covered porch, and attached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, garage extension, and minimal window openings on this side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a patio, swimming pool, and round hot tub structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, secondary entrances, and the full length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some bay and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps leading to a single main door, and a prominent overhang
